_gutter_patch_2026_05_24.reason: Apr-26 French batch gutter section silently corrupted at source — K-style aluminum 5" showing $34/LF nationwide, half-round inverted, copper 6" at $1/LF. Audit confirmed 40 markets broken (24 TX + 11 MN + 5 MI). Other line items (roofing/siding/flashing) verified correct via live Xactimate API pull on 2026-05-24.
_gutter_patch_2026_05_24.fix: Replaced 8 gutter rows in each broken market with NYBI8X_MAR26 × per-market regional ratio (median of non-gutter items). Brandi's Houston (TXHO8X_APR26) uses ratio 0.768 → K-style 5" aluminum now $9.33/LF (vs broken $34.41).
_gutter_patch_2026_05_24.reversal: Each patched row has _patched_2026_05_24:true + _original_price preserved. Remove the patched_ flag and restore _original_price to revert. Permanent fix: have Alfonso re-export 99-item template against each broken pricelist via Xactimate Desktop and replace allItems entirely.

phase_2.reason: Phase 1 missed half-round + gutter guard + min-labor rows because NYBI8X_MAR26 allItems doesn't contain them. Phase 2 uses live API exports of Alfonso's 99-item template (TEMPLATE on NY + ALS_TESTING_PRICE on SC, pulled fresh 2026-05-24) with normalized matching (strip R&R, half-round↔half round, whitespace).
phase_2.rule: patched_price = source_price × (market median non-gutter ratio vs source)
